verification.summary: All 47 dossier facts were re-checked against the on-chain action metadata, on-chain context block, doctrine text, and verbatim anchor document. Every fact is supported: all figures (2,350,000 ADA ask, $0.1787/Ada, $420,000/year, $70,000 per FTE, budget category amounts and shares, vote counts, treasury flow values, recipient history totals, grant amounts), all dates (epochs 637/644, Feb/Aug 2027 audits, Aug 2026–Jul 2027 schedule, July 2026 prior funding end), and all named entities (Tastenkunst GmbH, Marcel Baumberg, Eternl, Intersect) match the source material exactly. No contradicted facts, no not_found facts, and no invented specifics; there are zero material discrepancies.
